description: This file defines data transfer object (DTO) classes used for API requests and responses in the mock backend of the application, including login, token refresh, and protected message responses.

classes.name: LoginRequest
classes.description: DTO for login request containing username and password.

classes.name: RefreshRequest
classes.description: DTO for token refresh request containing refresh token.

classes.name: TokenResponse
classes.description: DTO for token response containing access token, refresh token, and expiry timestamp.

classes.name: ProtectedResponse
classes.description: DTO for generic protected message response.
